data: Hey! Find and open the chest at the end of the level!
Congratulations! You've found all the treasure chests! Thank you!
Your progress is excellent! Keep it up!
To attack, press SPACE or "On-Screen Sword Button".
You are far from home, the difficulty will increase!
Push the stones to fill the holes!
Keep it up! You are a great treasure hunter!
The people of your village are very happy! Your progress is very good!
Your father is very proud of you! Keep finding the treasure chests!
You have reached the penultimate level! Now the challenges are higher!
Congratulations! You have reached the final level!
Keep it up, you'll be able to help your entire village!
Do not give up! You are almost there!
